title: Effusiella pseudocheila
taxonomy: Effusiella pseudocheila is classified as a species of fungus in the family Mytilinidiaceae. It belongs to the genus Effusiella, which comprises several species of fungi. Effusiella pseudocheila is a lichenicolous fungus, meaning it grows on lichens. The classification of Effusiella pseudocheila is further specified as a member of the order Pleosporales. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification within the fungal kingdom.
